title: Recurring Property Maintenance Business
supportTraining: Full training and support included, no industry experience necessary
description:
Opportunity to acquire a property services business offering a range of maintenance, repair, and improvement solutions for residential and light commercial clients. Services are designed to help property owners maintain, enhance, and protect their investments through ongoing care and project-based work.

Revenue is generated through a combination of recurring maintenance services and one-time repair or improvement projects. This mix creates steady baseline income while allowing for higher-ticket jobs and expanded service offerings.

The business operates with structured systems for scheduling, customer management, and service delivery. Work can be performed through technicians or subcontractors, allowing flexibility in how the business is staffed and scaled.

Key Highlights:

Multiple service offerings across property maintenance and repairs
Recurring service opportunities alongside project-based revenue
Residential and light commercial client base

Ad#:2485180
